'''sonangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vectorborne|vectorborne]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vectorborne|vectorborne]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sonangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || sonangithi || sonangiji || sonangishi || sonangiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || sonanguthu || sonanguju || sonangushu || sonanguku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || sonanguthu || sonanguju || sonangushu || sonanguku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || sonangufthuf || sonangufjuf || sonangufshuf || sonangufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || sonangethe || sonangeje || sonangeshe || sonangeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || sonangotho || sonangojo || sonangosho || sonangoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || sonangotho || sonangojo || sonangosho || sonangoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || sonangofthof || sonangofjof || sonangofshof || sonangofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || sonangïfthïf || sonangïfjïf || sonangïfshïf || sonangïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || sonangïfthïf || sonangïfjïf || sonangïfshïf || sonangïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || sonangïfthïf || sonangïfjïf || sonangïfshïf || sonangïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || sonangïfthïf || sonangïfjïf || sonangïfshïf || sonangïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || sonangæthæ || sonangæjæ || sonangæshæ || sonangækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || sonangatha || sonangaja || sonangasha || sonangaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || sonangatha || sonangaja || sonangasha || sonangaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || sonangafthaf || sonangafjaf || sonangafshaf || sonangafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || sonangasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || sonangshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || sonangroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || sonangmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || sonangyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gosonangnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gosonangnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gosonangnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gosonangnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || sonanangasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || sonanangshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || sonanangroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || sonanangmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || sonanangyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gosonanangnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gosonanangnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gosonanangnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gosonanangnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || senængasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || senængshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || senængroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || senængmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || senængyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gosenængnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gosenængnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gosenængnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gosenængnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || sonfangasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || sonfangshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || sonfangroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || sonfangmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || sonfangyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gosonfangnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gosonfangnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gosonfangnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gosonfangnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
